title: amoria reflexa
intro: Amoria reflexa, also known as the coral tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Amoria reflexa include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. Amoria reflexa can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
